description: Everyday sentences using the most common Tagalog adjectives. Each entry's focus field shows the adjective.

sentences.tagalog: Maganda ang tanawin mula sa bundok.
sentences.english: The view from the mountain is beautiful.

sentences.tagalog: Maganda ang boses ng kapatid ko.
sentences.english: My sibling's voice is beautiful.

sentences.tagalog: Maganda ang panahon para mamasyal.
sentences.english: The weather is nice for going out.

sentences.tagalog: Napakaganda ng mga bulaklak sa hardin.
sentences.english: The flowers in the garden are very beautiful.

sentences.tagalog: Gwapo ang bagong empleyado sa opisina.
sentences.english: The new employee at the office is handsome.

sentences.tagalog: Gwapo ang anak nila, katulad ng tatay niya.
sentences.english: Their son is handsome, just like his father.

sentences.tagalog: Gwapo si Marco kapag naka-barong siya.
sentences.english: Marco is handsome when he wears a barong.

sentences.tagalog: Ang gwapo ng aktor sa pelikulang iyon.
sentences.english: The actor in that movie is so handsome.

sentences.tagalog: Masarap ang sinigang na niluto ng nanay.
sentences.english: The sinigang that mother cooked is delicious.

sentences.tagalog: Masarap ang tubig na malamig pagkatapos mag-ehersisyo.
sentences.english: Cold water is refreshing after exercising.

sentences.tagalog: Masarap matulog kapag umuulan.
sentences.english: It feels good to sleep when it is raining.

sentences.tagalog: Masarap ang pagkain sa karinderyang iyon.
sentences.english: The food at that eatery is delicious.

sentences.tagalog: Mabait ang bago naming guro.
sentences.english: Our new teacher is kind.

sentences.tagalog: Mabait siya sa mga matatanda.
sentences.english: He/she is kind to the elderly.

sentences.tagalog: Mabait ang aso namin sa mga bata.
sentences.english: Our dog is gentle with children.

sentences.tagalog: Napakabait ng mga tao sa baryong ito.
sentences.english: The people in this village are very kind.

sentences.tagalog: Malaki ang bahay ng mga kapitbahay namin.
sentences.english: Our neighbors' house is big.

sentences.tagalog: Malaki ang tulong mo sa amin.
sentences.english: You have been a big help to us.

sentences.tagalog: Malaki ang pagbabago sa bayan namin.
sentences.english: There is a big change in our town.

sentences.tagalog: Masyadong malaki ang sapatos na ito para sa akin.
sentences.english: These shoes are too big for me.

sentences.tagalog: Maliit ang kwarto pero maaliwalas.
sentences.english: The room is small but airy.

sentences.tagalog: Maliit pa ang anak nila.
sentences.english: Their child is still small.

sentences.tagalog: Maliit lang ang tindahan pero kumpleto.
sentences.english: The store is small but complete.

sentences.tagalog: Maliit ang letra, hindi ko mabasa.
sentences.english: The letters are small, I cannot read them.

sentences.tagalog: Mainit ang kape, mag-ingat ka.
sentences.english: The coffee is hot, be careful.

sentences.tagalog: Mainit ang panahon tuwing Abril.
sentences.english: The weather is hot every April.

sentences.tagalog: Mainit pa ang sabaw, hipan mo muna.
sentences.english: The soup is still hot, blow on it first.

sentences.tagalog: Sobrang init sa loob ng dyip kanina.
sentences.english: It was very hot inside the jeepney earlier.

sentences.tagalog: Malamig ang hangin sa Baguio.
sentences.english: The air in Baguio is cold.

sentences.tagalog: Malamig ang tubig sa balon.
sentences.english: The water in the well is cold.

sentences.tagalog: Malamig na ang kape ko, painitin ko muna.
sentences.english: My coffee is already cold, I will heat it up first.

sentences.tagalog: Malamig ang mga gabi tuwing Disyembre.
sentences.english: The nights are cold every December.

sentences.tagalog: Masaya kami sa piknik kahapon.
sentences.english: We were happy at the picnic yesterday.

sentences.tagalog: Masaya ang pista sa amin tuwing Mayo.
sentences.english: The fiesta in our town is fun every May.

sentences.tagalog: Masaya ako para sa iyo.
sentences.english: I am happy for you.

sentences.tagalog: Masayang magtrabaho kasama sila.
sentences.english: It is fun to work with them.

sentences.tagalog: Malungkot siya dahil umalis ang kaibigan niya.
sentences.english: He/she is sad because his/her friend left.

sentences.tagalog: Malungkot ang pelikulang napanood namin.
sentences.english: The movie we watched was sad.

sentences.tagalog: Malungkot ang bahay kapag wala ang mga bata.
sentences.english: The house is gloomy when the children are away.

sentences.tagalog: Huwag kang malungkot, babalik din sila.
sentences.english: Do not be sad, they will come back.

sentences.tagalog: Pagod ako pagkatapos ng mahabang araw.
sentences.english: I am tired after a long day.

sentences.tagalog: Pagod ang mga manggagawa pagkatapos ng trabaho.
sentences.english: The workers are tired after work.

sentences.tagalog: Mukhang pagod ka, magpahinga ka muna.
sentences.english: You look tired, rest for a while.

sentences.tagalog: Kahit pagod ako, masaya pa rin ako.
sentences.english: Even though I am tired, I am still happy.

sentences.tagalog: Gutom na ako, kumain na tayo.
sentences.english: I am hungry, let's eat now.

sentences.tagalog: Gutom ang mga bata pagkatapos maglaro.
sentences.english: The children are hungry after playing.

sentences.tagalog: Kapag gutom ako, hindi ako makapag-isip.
sentences.english: When I am hungry, I cannot think.

sentences.tagalog: Gutom na gutom kami pagkababa ng bundok.
sentences.english: We were very hungry after coming down the mountain.

sentences.tagalog: Busog pa ako mula sa tanghalian.
sentences.english: I am still full from lunch.

sentences.tagalog: Busog na ang mga bisita, salamat sa handa.
sentences.english: The guests are full, thanks to the spread.

sentences.tagalog: Hindi na ako kakain, busog pa ako.
sentences.english: I will not eat anymore, I am still full.

sentences.tagalog: Busog na busog ako sa hapunan.
sentences.english: I am very full from dinner.

sentences.tagalog: Uhaw ako pagkatapos maglakad sa init.
sentences.english: I am thirsty after walking in the heat.

sentences.tagalog: Uhaw ang mga halaman, diligan mo sila.
sentences.english: The plants are thirsty, water them.

sentences.tagalog: Kapag uhaw ka, uminom ka ng tubig.
sentences.english: When you are thirsty, drink water.

sentences.tagalog: Uhaw na uhaw kami pagkatapos ng laro.
sentences.english: We were very thirsty after the game.

sentences.tagalog: Matamis ang mangga mula sa probinsya.
sentences.english: The mango from the province is sweet.

sentences.tagalog: Matamis masyado ang kape mo.
sentences.english: Your coffee is too sweet.

sentences.tagalog: Matamis ang ngiti ng sanggol.
sentences.english: The baby's smile is sweet.

sentences.tagalog: Gusto ko ng matamis na panghimagas.
sentences.english: I want a sweet dessert.

sentences.tagalog: Maalat ang sabaw, dagdagan mo ng tubig.
sentences.english: The soup is salty, add some water.

sentences.tagalog: Maalat ang tubig ng dagat.
sentences.english: Seawater is salty.

sentences.tagalog: Masyadong maalat ang tuyo para sa akin.
sentences.english: The dried fish is too salty for me.

sentences.tagalog: Ayaw niya ng maalat na pagkain.
sentences.english: He/she does not like salty food.

sentences.tagalog: Maasim ang kalamansi pero masarap sa sabaw.
sentences.english: Calamansi is sour but tasty in soup.

sentences.tagalog: Maasim pa ang mangga, hilaw pa kasi.
sentences.english: The mango is still sour because it is still unripe.

sentences.tagalog: Gusto ko ng maasim na sinigang.
sentences.english: I like sour sinigang.

sentences.tagalog: Maasim ang mukha niya kaninang umaga.
sentences.english: He/she had a sour face this morning.

sentences.tagalog: Maanghang ang sili sa Bicol.
sentences.english: The chili in Bicol is spicy.

sentences.tagalog: Maanghang masyado ang ulam para sa mga bata.
sentences.english: The dish is too spicy for the children.

sentences.tagalog: Gusto mo ba ng maanghang na pagkain?
sentences.english: Do you like spicy food?

sentences.tagalog: Maanghang ang bagong recipe ng tatay.
sentences.english: Father's new recipe is spicy.

sentences.tagalog: Malakas ang ulan kagabi.
sentences.english: The rain was heavy last night.

sentences.tagalog: Malakas ang katawan niya dahil nag-eehersisyo siya.
sentences.english: His/her body is strong because he/she exercises.

sentences.tagalog: Malakas ang boses ng tagapagsalita.
sentences.english: The speaker's voice is loud.

sentences.tagalog: Malakas ang hangin, isara mo ang bintana.
sentences.english: The wind is strong, close the window.

sentences.tagalog: Mahina ang signal dito sa bundok.
sentences.english: The signal is weak here in the mountains.

sentences.tagalog: Mahina pa siya pagkatapos ng sakit.
sentences.english: He/she is still weak after being sick.

sentences.tagalog: Mahina ang ilaw sa kwarto ko.
sentences.english: The light in my room is dim.

sentences.tagalog: Magsalita ka nang malakas, mahina ang tenga ng lolo.
sentences.english: Speak loudly, grandfather's hearing is weak.

sentences.tagalog: Matalino ang anak nila sa matematika.
sentences.english: Their child is smart in mathematics.

sentences.tagalog: Matalino ang desisyon mong mag-ipon.
sentences.english: Your decision to save money is smart.

sentences.tagalog: Matalino ang aso namin, marunong magbukas ng pinto.
sentences.english: Our dog is clever, it knows how to open the door.

sentences.tagalog: Hindi lang siya matalino, masipag pa.
sentences.english: He/she is not only smart but also hardworking.

sentences.tagalog: Masipag ang mga magsasaka sa aming baryo.
sentences.english: The farmers in our village are hardworking.

sentences.tagalog: Masipag siyang mag-aral tuwing gabi.
sentences.english: He/she studies diligently every night.

sentences.tagalog: Masipag ang bagong katulong namin.
sentences.english: Our new helper is hardworking.

sentences.tagalog: Kapag masipag ka, may bunga ang pagod mo.
sentences.english: If you are hardworking, your effort will bear fruit.

sentences.tagalog: Tamad siyang maglinis ng kwarto niya.
sentences.english: He/she is too lazy to clean his/her room.

sentences.tagalog: Tamad ako gumising tuwing Lunes.
sentences.english: I am lazy to get up every Monday.

sentences.tagalog: Huwag kang tamad, tapusin mo ang trabaho mo.
sentences.english: Do not be lazy, finish your work.

sentences.tagalog: Tamad ang pusa namin, tulog lang nang tulog.
sentences.english: Our cat is lazy, it just keeps sleeping.

sentences.tagalog: Maingay ang kalsada tuwing umaga.
sentences.english: The street is noisy every morning.

sentences.tagalog: Maingay ang mga bata sa labas.
sentences.english: The children outside are noisy.

sentences.tagalog: Masyadong maingay sa loob ng dyip.
sentences.english: It is too noisy inside the jeepney.

sentences.tagalog: Huwag kang maingay, natutulog ang sanggol.
sentences.english: Do not be noisy, the baby is sleeping.

sentences.tagalog: Tahimik ang baryo tuwing gabi.
sentences.english: The village is quiet at night.

sentences.tagalog: Tahimik siya sa klase pero matalino.
sentences.english: He/she is quiet in class but smart.

sentences.tagalog: Tahimik ang bahay kapag wala ang mga bata.
sentences.english: The house is quiet when the children are away.

sentences.tagalog: Gusto ko ng tahimik na lugar para magbasa.
sentences.english: I want a quiet place to read.

sentences.tagalog: Madilim na sa labas, umuwi na tayo.
sentences.english: It is already dark outside, let's go home.

sentences.tagalog: Madilim ang kwarto, buksan mo ang ilaw.
sentences.english: The room is dark, turn on the light.

sentences.tagalog: Madilim ang langit, mukhang uulan.
sentences.english: The sky is dark, it looks like it will rain.

sentences.tagalog: Mag-ingat ka sa madilim na daan.
sentences.english: Be careful on the dark road.

sentences.tagalog: Maliwanag ang buwan ngayong gabi.
sentences.english: The moon is bright tonight.

sentences.tagalog: Maliwanag ang kusina namin sa umaga.
sentences.english: Our kitchen is bright in the morning.

sentences.tagalog: Maliwanag ang paliwanag ng guro.
sentences.english: The teacher's explanation is clear.

sentences.tagalog: Maliwanag pa, maglaro muna tayo sa labas.
sentences.english: It is still bright, let's play outside first.

sentences.tagalog: Malayo ang paaralan mula sa bahay namin.
sentences.english: The school is far from our house.

sentences.tagalog: Malayo pa ba ang susunod na bayan?
sentences.english: Is the next town still far?

sentences.tagalog: Malayo ang narating niya dahil sa sipag niya.
sentences.english: He/she has gone far because of his/her diligence.

sentences.tagalog: Huwag kang lumangoy nang malayo sa pampang.
sentences.english: Do not swim far from the shore.

sentences.tagalog: Malapit lang ang tindahan, maglakad na lang tayo.
sentences.english: The store is just near, let's just walk.

sentences.tagalog: Malapit na ang Pasko.
sentences.english: Christmas is near.

sentences.tagalog: Malapit kami sa isa't isa mula pagkabata.
sentences.english: We have been close to each other since childhood.

sentences.tagalog: Malapit ang bahay ko sa istasyon ng bus.
sentences.english: My house is near the bus station.

sentences.tagalog: Mabilis tumakbo ang bagong sasakyan.
sentences.english: The new car runs fast.

sentences.tagalog: Mabilis siyang matuto ng bagong wika.
sentences.english: He/she learns a new language quickly.

sentences.tagalog: Mabilis lumipas ang bakasyon.
sentences.english: The vacation passed quickly.

sentences.tagalog: Mabilis ang serbisyo sa restawran na iyon.
sentences.english: The service at that restaurant is fast.

sentences.tagalog: Mabagal ang internet tuwing gabi.
sentences.english: The internet is slow at night.

sentences.tagalog: Mabagal maglakad ang lolo ko pero sigurado.
sentences.english: My grandfather walks slowly but surely.

sentences.tagalog: Mabagal ang biyahe dahil sa trapiko.
sentences.english: The trip is slow because of traffic.

sentences.tagalog: Mabagal ang orasan sa kusina.
sentences.english: The clock in the kitchen is slow.

sentences.tagalog: Malinis ang mga kalsada sa bayang ito.
sentences.english: The streets in this town are clean.

sentences.tagalog: Malinis ang tubig sa bukal.
sentences.english: The water from the spring is clean.

sentences.tagalog: Panatilihing malinis ang inyong paligid.
sentences.english: Keep your surroundings clean.

sentences.tagalog: Malinis ang kwarto pagkatapos naming maglinis.
sentences.english: The room is clean after we cleaned it.

sentences.tagalog: Marumi ang sapatos ko dahil sa putik.
sentences.english: My shoes are dirty because of the mud.

sentences.tagalog: Marumi ang tubig sa kanal.
sentences.english: The water in the canal is dirty.

sentences.tagalog: Huwag kang uminom sa maruming baso.
sentences.english: Do not drink from a dirty glass.

sentences.tagalog: Marumi pa ang mga pinggan, hugasan mo muna.
sentences.english: The dishes are still dirty, wash them first.

sentences.tagalog: Bago ang telepono na binili niya.
sentences.english: The phone he/she bought is new.

sentences.tagalog: Bago pa lang kami dito sa lugar na ito.
sentences.english: We are still new to this place.

sentences.tagalog: May bagong tindahan sa may kanto.
sentences.english: There is a new store at the corner.

sentences.tagalog: Masaya ako sa bago kong trabaho.
sentences.english: I am happy with my new job.

sentences.tagalog: Luma na ang bisikleta ko pero gumagana pa.
sentences.english: My bicycle is old but it still works.

sentences.tagalog: Luma ang simbahan sa gitna ng bayan.
sentences.english: The church in the middle of town is old.

sentences.tagalog: Nagbenta kami ng mga lumang damit.
sentences.english: We sold old clothes.

sentences.tagalog: Gusto ko ang mga lumang kanta.
sentences.english: I like old songs.

sentences.tagalog: Mahal ang bilihin ngayon.
sentences.english: Goods are expensive nowadays.

sentences.tagalog: Mahal ang renta sa lungsod.
sentences.english: Rent in the city is expensive.

sentences.tagalog: Masyadong mahal ang sapatos na ito.
sentences.english: These shoes are too expensive.

sentences.tagalog: Kahit mahal, binili niya pa rin ang regalo.
sentences.english: Even though it was expensive, he/she still bought the gift.

sentences.tagalog: Mura ang gulay kapag anihan.
sentences.english: Vegetables are cheap during harvest season.

sentences.tagalog: Mura ang pamasahe sa dyip.
sentences.english: The jeepney fare is cheap.

sentences.tagalog: Bumili kami ng murang prutas sa palengke.
sentences.english: We bought cheap fruit at the market.

sentences.tagalog: Mura pero matibay ang gamit na ito.
sentences.english: This item is cheap but durable.

sentences.tagalog: Mataas ang gusali sa gitna ng lungsod.
sentences.english: The building in the middle of the city is tall.

sentences.tagalog: Mataas ang grado niya ngayong taon.
sentences.english: His/her grades are high this year.

sentences.tagalog: Mataas ang lagnat ng anak ko kagabi.
sentences.english: My child's fever was high last night.

sentences.tagalog: Mataas ang pangarap niya para sa pamilya niya.
sentences.english: He/she has high dreams for his/her family.

sentences.tagalog: Mababa ang bakod ng bahay namin.
sentences.english: The fence of our house is low.

sentences.tagalog: Mababa ang presyo ng bigas ngayon.
sentences.english: The price of rice is low right now.

sentences.tagalog: Mababa ang mesa para sa mga bata.
sentences.english: The table is low for the children.

sentences.tagalog: Kahit mababa ang sahod, nag-iipon pa rin siya.
sentences.english: Even though the salary is low, he/she still saves.

sentences.tagalog: Mahaba ang pila sa bangko kanina.
sentences.english: The line at the bank was long earlier.

sentences.tagalog: Mahaba ang buhok ng kapatid ko.
sentences.english: My sibling's hair is long.

sentences.tagalog: Mahaba ang biyahe papuntang probinsya.
sentences.english: The trip to the province is long.

sentences.tagalog: Mahaba pa ang gabi, mag-usap pa tayo.
sentences.english: The night is still long, let's keep talking.

sentences.tagalog: Maikli ang bakasyon namin ngayong taon.
sentences.english: Our vacation this year is short.

sentences.tagalog: Maikli ang buhok niya ngayon.
sentences.english: His/her hair is short now.

sentences.tagalog: Maikli lang ang pahinga namin sa trabaho.
sentences.english: Our break at work is just short.

sentences.tagalog: Maikli ang kwento pero maganda ang aral.
sentences.english: The story is short but the lesson is good.

sentences.tagalog: Mabigat ang bag ko dahil sa mga libro.
sentences.english: My bag is heavy because of the books.

sentences.tagalog: Mabigat ang kahon, tulungan mo ako.
sentences.english: The box is heavy, help me.

sentences.tagalog: Mabigat ang loob ko na umalis.
sentences.english: It is hard for me to leave.

sentences.tagalog: Mabigat ang ulan kaya hindi kami umalis.
sentences.english: The rain was heavy so we did not leave.

sentences.tagalog: Magaan ang bag ko ngayon.
sentences.english: My bag is light today.

sentences.tagalog: Magaan ang pakiramdam ko pagkatapos magpahinga.
sentences.english: I feel light after resting.

sentences.tagalog: Magaan ang trabaho ngayong araw.
sentences.english: The work today is light.

sentences.tagalog: Magaan siyang kasama sa bahay.
sentences.english: He/she is easy to live with.

sentences.tagalog: Basa ang damit ko dahil sa ulan.
sentences.english: My clothes are wet because of the rain.

sentences.tagalog: Basa pa ang sahig, mag-ingat ka.
sentences.english: The floor is still wet, be careful.

sentences.tagalog: Basa ang buhok niya galing sa pagligo.
sentences.english: His/her hair is wet from bathing.

sentences.tagalog: Huwag mong isuot ang basang sapatos.
sentences.english: Do not wear the wet shoes.

sentences.tagalog: Tuyo na ang mga damit sa sampayan.
sentences.english: The clothes on the clothesline are already dry.

sentences.tagalog: Tuyo ang lupa dahil walang ulan.
sentences.english: The soil is dry because there is no rain.

sentences.tagalog: Tuyo na ang pintura sa dingding.
sentences.english: The paint on the wall is already dry.

sentences.tagalog: Gusto ko ng tuyong panahon para maglaba.
sentences.english: I want dry weather for doing laundry.

sentences.tagalog: Matigas ang tinapay, luma na siguro.
sentences.english: The bread is hard, it is probably old.

sentences.tagalog: Matigas ang kama sa hotel.
sentences.english: The bed at the hotel is hard.

sentences.tagalog: Matigas ang ulo ng kapatid ko minsan.
sentences.english: My sibling is stubborn sometimes.

sentences.tagalog: Matigas pa ang mangga, hindi pa hinog.
sentences.english: The mango is still hard, it is not yet ripe.

sentences.tagalog: Malambot ang unan ko, sarap matulog.
sentences.english: My pillow is soft, it is nice to sleep on.

sentences.tagalog: Malambot ang kanin na niluto niya.
sentences.english: The rice he/she cooked is soft.

sentences.tagalog: Malambot ang balahibo ng pusa.
sentences.english: The cat's fur is soft.

sentences.tagalog: Gusto ko ng malambot na tinapay.
sentences.english: I like soft bread.

sentences.tagalog: Madali lang ang pagsusulit kahapon.
sentences.english: The exam yesterday was easy.

sentences.tagalog: Madali siyang kausap.
sentences.english: He/she is easy to talk to.

sentences.tagalog: Madaling pumunta sa palengke mula dito.
sentences.english: It is easy to get to the market from here.

sentences.tagalog: Madali lang matutunan ang lutong ito.
sentences.english: This recipe is easy to learn.

sentences.tagalog: Mahirap ang pagsusulit sa matematika.
sentences.english: The mathematics exam is difficult.

sentences.tagalog: Mahirap gumising nang maaga tuwing malamig.
sentences.english: It is hard to wake up early when it is cold.

sentences.tagalog: Mahirap ang buhay pero kaya natin ito.
sentences.english: Life is hard but we can do this.

sentences.tagalog: Mahirap maghanap ng trabaho ngayon.
sentences.english: It is hard to find a job nowadays.

sentences.tagalog: Tama ang sagot mo sa tanong.
sentences.english: Your answer to the question is correct.

sentences.tagalog: Tama ang desisyon mong manatili.
sentences.english: Your decision to stay is right.

sentences.tagalog: Tama na ang kanin, salamat.
sentences.english: That is enough rice, thank you.

sentences.tagalog: Tama ka, dapat tayong umalis nang maaga.
sentences.english: You are right, we should leave early.

sentences.tagalog: Mali ang direksyong tinahak namin.
sentences.english: We took the wrong direction.

sentences.tagalog: Mali ang sukli na ibinigay niya.
sentences.english: The change he/she gave was wrong.

sentences.tagalog: Mali ang balita na kumalat.
sentences.english: The news that spread was wrong.

sentences.tagalog: Kung mali ako, sabihin mo sa akin.
sentences.english: If I am wrong, tell me.

sentences.tagalog: Matanda na ang lolo ko pero malakas pa.
sentences.english: My grandfather is old but still strong.

sentences.tagalog: Matanda siya sa akin ng dalawang taon.
sentences.english: He/she is older than me by two years.

sentences.tagalog: Igalang natin ang mga matatanda.
sentences.english: Let us respect the elderly.

sentences.tagalog: Ang matandang puno sa plaza ay isandaang taon na.
sentences.english: The old tree in the plaza is a hundred years old.

sentences.tagalog: Bata pa siya pero responsable na.
sentences.english: He/she is still young but already responsible.

sentences.tagalog: Batang-bata pa ako noong lumipat kami dito.
sentences.english: I was very young when we moved here.

sentences.tagalog: Mukha siyang bata para sa edad niya.
sentences.english: He/she looks young for his/her age.

sentences.tagalog: Noong bata pa ako, naglalaro kami sa ilog.
sentences.english: When I was young, we used to play in the river.

sentences.tagalog: Payat ang pusa na nakita namin sa kalye.
sentences.english: The cat we saw on the street is thin.

sentences.tagalog: Pumayat siya dahil sa ehersisyo.
sentences.english: He/she became thin because of exercise.

sentences.tagalog: Payat ang mga sanga ng batang puno.
sentences.english: The branches of the young tree are thin.

sentences.tagalog: Payat pa rin siya kahit malakas kumain.
sentences.english: He/she is still thin even though he/she eats a lot.

sentences.tagalog: Mataba ang aso namin dahil sa sobrang pagkain.
sentences.english: Our dog is fat because of too much food.

sentences.tagalog: Mataba ang lupa dito, maganda pagtaniman.
sentences.english: The soil here is fertile, good for planting.

sentences.tagalog: Ang mataba na baboy ay ibebenta sa pista.
sentences.english: The fat pig will be sold at the fiesta.

sentences.tagalog: Tumaba ako noong bakasyon.
sentences.english: I gained weight during the vacation.

sentences.tagalog: Makapal ang libro na binabasa niya.
sentences.english: The book he/she is reading is thick.

sentences.tagalog: Makapal ang kumot ko tuwing malamig.
sentences.english: My blanket is thick when it is cold.

sentences.tagalog: Makapal ang usok mula sa sunog.
sentences.english: The smoke from the fire is thick.

sentences.tagalog: Makapal ang ulap, baka umulan.
sentences.english: The clouds are thick, it might rain.

sentences.tagalog: Manipis ang papel na ginamit ko.
sentences.english: The paper I used is thin.

sentences.tagalog: Manipis ang damit niya kaya nilalamig siya.
sentences.english: His/her clothes are thin so he/she feels cold.

sentences.tagalog: Manipis ang pader, naririnig ko ang kapitbahay.
sentences.english: The wall is thin, I can hear the neighbor.

sentences.tagalog: Gusto ko ng manipis na kumot tuwing tag-init.
sentences.english: I like a thin blanket during summer.

sentences.tagalog: Puno ang dyip kaya naghintay kami ng iba.
sentences.english: The jeepney was full so we waited for another.

sentences.tagalog: Puno ang baso, mag-ingat ka sa pagbuhat.
sentences.english: The glass is full, be careful carrying it.

sentences.tagalog: Puno ng tao ang plaza tuwing pista.
sentences.english: The plaza is full of people during the fiesta.

sentences.tagalog: Puno ng prutas ang basket na dala niya.
sentences.english: The basket he/she carried is full of fruit.

sentences.tagalog: Matibay ang bahay na gawa sa bato.
sentences.english: A house made of stone is sturdy.

sentences.tagalog: Matibay ang sapatos na binili ko noong isang taon.
sentences.english: The shoes I bought last year are durable.

sentences.tagalog: Matibay ang pagkakaibigan namin.
sentences.english: Our friendship is strong.

sentences.tagalog: Bumili ka ng matibay na payong.
sentences.english: Buy a sturdy umbrella.

sentences.tagalog: Sariwa ang isda sa palengke tuwing umaga.
sentences.english: The fish at the market is fresh every morning.

sentences.tagalog: Sariwa ang hangin sa probinsya.
sentences.english: The air in the province is fresh.

sentences.tagalog: Bumili ka ng sariwang gulay para sa sabaw.
sentences.english: Buy fresh vegetables for the soup.

sentences.tagalog: Sariwa pa ang alaala ng bakasyon namin.
sentences.english: The memory of our vacation is still fresh.

sentences.tagalog: Maluwang ang bagong kalsada sa bayan.
sentences.english: The new road in town is wide.

sentences.tagalog: Maluwang ang damit na binili ko.
sentences.english: The clothes I bought are loose.

sentences.tagalog: Maluwang ang sala ng bahay nila.
sentences.english: The living room of their house is spacious.

sentences.tagalog: Umupo tayo doon, maluwang pa.
sentences.english: Let's sit there, it is still spacious.

sentences.tagalog: Makitid ang daan papunta sa bukid.
sentences.english: The path to the farm is narrow.

sentences.tagalog: Makitid ang hagdan kaya dahan-dahan ka.
sentences.english: The stairs are narrow so go slowly.

sentences.tagalog: Makitid ang parking sa gusaling ito.
sentences.english: The parking at this building is tight.

sentences.tagalog: Makitid ang tulay, isa-isa lang ang tumawid.
sentences.english: The bridge is narrow, cross one at a time.

sentences.tagalog: Mahalaga ang edukasyon para sa kinabukasan.
sentences.english: Education is important for the future.

sentences.tagalog: Mahalaga ka sa amin.
sentences.english: You are important to us.

sentences.tagalog: Mahalaga ang oras, huwag natin itong sayangin.
sentences.english: Time is valuable, let us not waste it.

sentences.tagalog: Mahalagang matulog nang sapat gabi-gabi.
sentences.english: It is important to get enough sleep every night.

sentences.tagalog: Masama ang pakiramdam ko ngayon.
sentences.english: I am feeling unwell today.

sentences.tagalog: Masama ang balita tungkol sa bagyo.
sentences.english: The news about the storm is bad.

sentences.tagalog: Masama ang magsinungaling sa magulang.
sentences.english: It is bad to lie to your parents.

sentences.tagalog: Huwag kang sumama sa masamang barkada.
sentences.english: Do not join a bad crowd.

sentences.tagalog: Mabuti ang lagay ng lolo ko ngayon.
sentences.english: My grandfather is in good condition now.

sentences.tagalog: Mabuti at nakarating kayo nang ligtas.
sentences.english: It is good that you arrived safely.

sentences.tagalog: Mabuti ang naging resulta ng pagsusulit niya.
sentences.english: The result of his/her exam was good.

sentences.tagalog: Gumawa ka ng mabuti sa kapwa mo.
sentences.english: Do good to your fellow man.

sentences.tagalog: Ligtas ang mga bata sa loob ng bahay.
sentences.english: The children are safe inside the house.

sentences.tagalog: Ligtas na daanan ito para sa mga naglalakad.
sentences.english: This is a safe path for pedestrians.

sentences.tagalog: Ligtas kaming nakauwi bago ang bagyo.
sentences.english: We got home safely before the storm.

sentences.tagalog: Panatilihing ligtas ang inyong mga gamit.
sentences.english: Keep your belongings safe.

sentences.tagalog: Mainam ang panahon para maglakbay.
sentences.english: The weather is ideal for traveling.

sentences.tagalog: Mainam na mag-impok habang bata pa.
sentences.english: It is good to save money while still young.

sentences.tagalog: Mainam ang lugar na ito para magpahinga.
sentences.english: This place is ideal for resting.

sentences.tagalog: Mainam na kumain ng gulay araw-araw.
sentences.english: It is good to eat vegetables every day.
